creator: shurd@FreeBSD.org
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of games/freedink-dfarc,
>
> Please note that PR ports/178187 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.

Looks good except the @dirrmtry should be changed to
share/icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes rather than deleted from the look of
it since share/icons/hicolor/32x32/mimetypes/application-x-dmod.png is
installed.
